title: DLS: Workplace Safety and Health Program (WSHP) — Main Page
description: Main landing page for the MA WSHP, recognized as an OSHA State Plan in August 2022, enforcing occupational safety/health across public-sector workplaces (state, county, municipal, public schools, colleges, universities, quasi-government). Federal OSHA retains private-sector jurisdiction. Links to complaint filing, whistleblower protection, SafetyWorks consultation, training, and the public-employee safety poster.
notes: WSHP became a full OSHA State Plan in August 2022, applying to public-sector workers including DDS/MassAbility employees. Contact (508) 616-0461 ext. 1. Includes a public-employee whistleblower-protection program for safety retaliation.
